column1: # XOR(logical1, [logical2], …) is TRUE iff an ODD number of the logical values
# are TRUE. Range-aware like AND/OR: scalars coerce strictly via to_bool (non-
# boolean text -> #VALUE!); inside a range text/blank cells are IGNORED, numbers
# (!= 0 is TRUE) and bools count, and an error cell PROPAGATES. With no logical
# Args use ';' as the separator (the family decoder splits on ';').
